title: satureja calamintha subsp. subnuda
intro: Satureja calamintha subsp. subnuda, commonly known as the narrow-leaved savory or subnuda savory, is a subspecies of the savory plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The essential oils extracted from this plant have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and wounds. Satureja calamintha subsp. subnuda can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties.
